core_concept: 融合科技與神秘的生物設計，體現SCP Wiki競賽中創意與恐怖元素的結合
composition_hint: 將機械結構與生物形態融合，突出視覺上的不對稱與光影對比
potential_subjects: A hybrid creature with mechanical limbs and organic flesh
A glowing entity with data streams flowing through its body
A corrupted digital entity with liquid metal veins
original_excerpt:
Welcome to the SCP Wiki's Contest Archive!
Here, you can find an archived listing of all past contests hosted on the SCP Wiki throughout the years.
1
Winners, concepts/themes, prize(s), hosts, and other relevant information will be listed. Links to their respective hubs will also be available along with each winning contest entry for convenience.
Footnotes
1
. With the exception of the
International GoI Contest 2019
, which was primarily hosted on the International Translation Archive. More info
